_note: HDB carpark codes in the Central Area pricing tier: $1.20 / 30min EPS during the Mon–Sat 07:00–17:00 peak band only ($0.60 otherwise), $20 daily cap.
_source: HDB's authoritative enumerated 'List of car parks within the Central Area' on the Short Term Parking Charges page (https://www.hdb.gov.sg/car-parks/short-term-parking/short-term-parking-charges/), verified against the 2024-05-23 capture. HDB lists carparks explicitly — it does NOT use a boundary polygon.
_changelog: 2026-05-31: replaced the v1 prefix-heuristic guess. Removed BRBL + KAML (both are Loading/Unloading-Bay codes, not Central car lots — false positives that over-charged). Added DUXM (Pinnacle@Duxton), PRM (Park Crescent), SLS (Sago Lane) per HDB's published list.
